whispering_well.name: Whispering Well
whispering_well.text: A violet well remembers every failed brew.

bound_alchemist.name: The Bound Alchemist
bound_alchemist.text: Chains bind a brewer to an ancient table.

mirror_cauldron.name: Mirror Cauldron
mirror_cauldron.text: Your reflection offers strength at a price.

bone_oracle.name: Bone Oracle
bone_oracle.text: Ivory dice rattle with possible futures.

cursed_chest.name: Cursed Royal Cache
cursed_chest.text: Gold light leaks through a seal of black wax.

ember_camp.name: Ember Camp
ember_camp.text: A quiet flame offers one moment of preparation.

frost_shrine.name: Frostbound Shrine
frost_shrine.text: A saint of ice holds a warm ember in both hands.

drowned_altar.name: Drowned Altar
drowned_altar.text: Blackwater coins circle an altar without sinking.

prism_archive.name: Prism Archive
prism_archive.text: Living formulae rearrange themselves behind crystal glass.

spore_garden.name: Dreamspore Garden
spore_garden.text: Each luminous cap dreams of becoming a potion.

ossuary_vault.name: Ossuary Vault
ossuary_vault.text: A relic hums between the ribs of an unnamed king.

astral_forge.name: Astral Forge
astral_forge.text: A cold star waits beneath the anvil.

moonlit_merchant.name: Moonlit Merchant
moonlit_merchant.text: The merchant accepts only promises and crystal.

abyssal_bargain.name: Abyssal Bargain
abyssal_bargain.text: Something below offers wealth through a mouth of ink.

echo_chamber.name: Echo Chamber
echo_chamber.text: Your last brew returns as a voice with better ideas.
